headline: How The Investment Story For Omnicom Group (OMC) Is Shifting After Recent Analyst Revisions
summary: Recent price target moves on Omnicom Group range from Citi lifting its view to US$115 from US$103 to more cautious cuts such as US$82 from US$88, with several Equal Weight calls around US$90. These changes reflect a split narrative, where some analysts point to programmatic audit outcomes and media review results as support for higher targets, while others focus on execution risk and limited upside. headline: Adobe Buyback And AI Partnerships Reframe Enterprise Growth Opportunity
summary: Adobe (NasdaqGS:ADBE) approved a new US$25b share repurchase authorization, running through 2030. The company announced new AI driven marketing partnerships with DICK'S Sporting Goods and Xfinity at its 2026 Summit. Adobe also expanded relationships with Omnicom and IBM to develop vertical specific AI agent solutions for enterprises.
